headline: JDE Peet’s EGM adopts all resolutions in relation to KDP Offer
summary: PRESS RELEASE Amsterdam, March 2, 2026 This is a press release by JDE Peet’s N.V. (JDE Peet’s or the Company) in connection with the recommended public offer by Kodiak BidCo B.V., an indirectly wholly-owned subsidiary of Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. for all the issued and outstanding shares in the capital of JDE Peet’s (the Offer). This press release does not constitute an offer, or any solicitation of any offer, to buy or subscribe for any securities in JDE Peet’s. Any offer will be made only by means

headline: Why Keurig is finally introducing its own coffee after nearly 30 years
summary: The homebrewing system is hoping its namesake brew will attract more consumers to the brand and tap into demand for premium products.
